# This file has been generated automatically. Do not edit manually.

gram_biomass = [amount_of_biomass] = g_biomass

metric_ton_biomass = 1e+06 * g_biomass = t_biomass
ton_biomass = 9.07e+05 * g_biomass = ton_biomass
pound_biomass = 454 * g_biomass = lb_biomass


joule_biomass_LHV = 6.41e-05 * g_biomass = J_biomass_LHV
watt_hour_biomass_LHV = 0.231 * g_biomass = Wh_biomass_LHV
british_thermal_unit_biomass_LHV = 0.0676 * g_biomass = Btu_biomass_LHV
international_british_thermal_unit_biomass_LHV = 0.0676 * g_biomass = Btu_it_biomass_LHV
thermochemical_british_thermal_unit_biomass_LHV = 0.0676 * g_biomass = Btu_th_biomass_LHV

watt_biomass_LHV = joule_biomass_LHV / second = W_biomass_LHV
watt_biomass_HHV = joule_biomass_HHV / second = W_biomass_HHV
